ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training round */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "round_num" INTEGER /* Number of the training round */,
  "round_start" TEXT /* Start time of the training round */,
  "completion_time_seconds" REAL /* Time taken to complete the training round in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training round (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used for this training round */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for this training round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_rounds_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, LSTM, etc.) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.) */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Deployment status of the model (e.g., deployed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training round this metric belongs to */,
  "accuracy_train" REAL /* Training accuracy for the model */,
  "loss_train" REAL /* Training loss for the model */,
  "accuracy_test" REAL /* Testing accuracy for the model */,
  "loss_test" REAL /* Testing loss for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES training_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, etc.) */,
  "size_mb" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., external API, uploaded file, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being experimented with */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the experiment or any noteworthy event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results or findings of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when access occurred */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when this version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when this hyperparameter was created */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource usage record */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training round this usage record belongs to */,
  "cpu_hours" REAL /* Total CPU hours used during this round */,
  "gpu_hours" REAL /* Total GPU hours used during this round */,
  "memory_usage_mb" INTEGER /* Memory usage in MB during this round */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource used (e.g., CPU, GPU, memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES training_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., success, failure, warning) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with this model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with this tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with this dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "tag_id")
)
